title: Pre-execution graph closure proven
scope_note: Planning/design closure DEFINITION artifact. It proves all 196 tasks are anchored and the graph is structurally closable, while the live execution gate remains closed for 11 honest blockers. It performs no product execution, deploys no schema, writes no live data, and executes no product task. It is distinct from release acceptance (generated/north_star_acceptance_report.json / RELEASE-001), which remains fail-closed until product outcomes are proven.

north_star.required_outcome: LifeOS is a living extension of David's intent.
Company, personal, development, and home form one coherent whole.
David can see and understand the whole.
David can direct it as one system.
LifeOS advances every domain without fragmenting the whole.

1_coverage_gate.clause: Every North Star anchor is coverage-complete and decomposition-complete, and every task is anchored to a North Star outcome.
1_coverage_gate.evaluated_with: scripts/build-execution-packets.py::evaluate_coverage_gate over the closure-ready coverage control embedded below

2_topology_gate.clause: Every parent_id resolves to a task in the graph, the dependency graph is acyclic, and every declared phase is non-empty with no task in an undeclared phase.

3_lifecycle_gate.clause: Draft stays non-executable, blocked stays blocked, Ready requires all gates, proof-backed tasks are Complete, failing proofs reopen as rolled-back, and no non-complete task is mislabeled ready; next_ready_task_id is null while the coverage gate is closed.

4_proof_gate.clause: No task is falsely marked complete without evidence (zero paper completions enter the closed graph).
4_proof_gate.coverage_authority: A completion counts only when a passing proof exists (proof_records/<task_id>.proof.json with status pass, or a passing proof_ledger entry). Self-declared CSV status is never accepted as a pass (same rule as generated/north_star_acceptance_report.json).

remediation.finding: Source status 'Complete' with proof_uri proof_records/NBSOURCE-006.proof.json, but that proof file does not exist and no passing proof-ledger entry exists.
remediation.action: Not accepted as a proven completion. Reclassified to open/unproven for closure; carried as an anchored open task on the execution frontier so NO paper completion enters the closed graph. No proof was fabricated (fabrication would violate the blueprint's Cryptographic Witness Chain anti-bluffing rule).
remediation.outcome_evidence_preserved: generated/notebooklm_source_extracts/NBSOURCE-006-temporal-attractors.md (verified verbatim by proof_records/NBSTATED-006.proof.json); 13-claim mapping in generated/notebooklm_source_registry.source.csv + notebooklm_source_claims.source.csv + notebooklm_claim_verification_queue.source.csv.
remediation.required_before_this_task_can_count_comp: Emit proof_records/NBSOURCE-006.proof.json (planning proof of the 13-claim extraction) OR correct its source status; tracked as the single named closure remediation.

5_rollback_gate.clause: Every task carries a rollback_plan, failing proofs reopen tasks as rolled-back, and the closure itself has a rollback plan.
5_rollback_gate.graph_005_rollback_plan: Restore the archived graph and manifests; keep execution closed if any closure check fails.

6_manifest_freshness_gate.clause: The execution-bundle manifest is regenerated against the current 196-task graph and revalidates clean.

regenerated_manifest.note: Regenerated by scripts/package-execution-bundle.py after this closure artifact was finalized; the manifest's own generated_at and sha256 are recorded in proof_records/GRAPH-005.proof.json to avoid a self-referential checksum loop.

6_manifest_freshness_gate.freshness_delta: payload grew 92 -> 410 files and package_root is now portable instead of retaining the stale 2026-07-03 /home/flexnetos/FlexNetOS path; the manifest reflects the live 196-task graph including this closure artifact

7_owner_approval_gate.clause: The live owner execution gate remains closed while the 11 recorded blockers are unresolved; the embedded open control is a planning simulation only.
7_owner_approval_gate.note: The embedded open control proves structural readiness without authorizing execution. generated/north_star_coverage.control.json and generated/task_graph.status.json remain closed; release acceptance (RELEASE-001) also stays fail-closed.

sum_equals_north_star.definition: The DESIGN sum: the union of the planned outcomes of all task families equals exactly the five North Star anchors — every anchor is served by >=1 bounded, dependency-ordered, proof-bearing task family (coverage), every task contributes to >=1 anchor (completeness), and no task produces an outcome outside the five anchors (no scope creep).

complete_anchoring.method: Each task is anchored to its phase's North Star outcome(s); phase->anchor assignment is justified by the anchor's required_outcome text.

0-foundation.justification: Planning-spine foundation gives David a legible, directable state map without fragmenting existing work.

0-north-star-graph.justification: NotebookLM sourcing, verification, canonical-graph decomposition, and decision tasks make the whole legible and steerable and seed the intent model.

1-preservation.justification: Preserve/reconcile every valid surface so the four domains stay one coherent whole while the topology is corrected, advancing progress without fragmentation.

1-schema.justification: Object/authority/task schema makes the plan legible and directable.

10-experience.justification: Unified experience makes LifeOS a living extension of intent that David can see and direct.

10-runtime-proof.justification: Runtime proof lets David direct and confirms advancement.

11-fleet-integration.justification: Fleet integration advances every domain under direction.

11-system-proof-release.justification: System proof/release advances the whole and binds domains coherently.

12-living-system.justification: The living system is the standing extension of David's intent that keeps advancing every domain.

12-worldsim-ingestion.justification: World-sim ingestion advances the substrate under direction.

2-foundation.justification: Runtime/store boundary foundation binds the domains into one whole and advances the substrate.

2-postgres-foundation.justification: PostgreSQL+RuVector canonical durable memory (STORE-001) is the single substrate that makes the domains one whole, carries David's intent as durable macro-state, and advances every domain.

2-simulation.justification: Calibrated simulation lets David steer execution and advance safely.

3-execution.justification: Governed execution pipeline lets David direct the system and advance work.

3-governed-execution.justification: Governed execution lets David direct LifeOS as one system and advance domains.

4-mvp.justification: Vertical MVP slice advances the whole under direction.

4-physical-consolidation.justification: Consolidating the physical topology binds the domains into one coherent whole and advances progress.

5-gates.justification: Execution gates let David direct and advance safely.

5-intelligence-substrate.justification: AgentDB/RuVector intelligence substrate makes LifeOS a living extension of intent and advances every domain.

6-mvp1-financial-legal.justification: Financial/legal MVP1 advances the company/personal domain as part of one whole.

6-rfc.justification: RFC governance lets David direct architecture and advance.

7-company-development.justification: Company + development domain advances as part of one coherent whole.

7-review.justification: Review makes progress legible and advances the whole.

8-execution-pipeline.justification: Execution pipeline makes the plan directable, legible, and advancing.

8-personal.justification: Personal domain advances as part of one coherent whole.

9-home.justification: Home domain advances as part of one coherent whole.

9-state-map.justification: State map lets David see and direct the whole.

execution_frontier.definition: The remaining 11 tasks are explicit blockers, not admitted execution packets. LPS-025 is rolled back; the other ten remain Draft while the live coverage gate is closed.
execution_frontier.first_bounded_product_task_rationale: No task is admitted while the live gate is closed. LPS-029 and LPS-031 have complete parents but remain owner-deferred physical-world work; LPS-025 must recover from its failing proof before LPS-026 through LPS-028 can advance.
execution_frontier.note: Naming the conditional frontier is planning, not execution. No task is started here and generated/execution_manifest.json therefore contains zero packets.

store_001_alignment.canonical_durable_owner: PostgreSQL + RuVector (ACID/PITR, No-Sidecar native extension) — owns every durable macro-state class exactly once.
store_001_alignment.transient_tier: redb (buffer / scratchpad / application-level WAL / BLAKE3 dedup cache / geometry engine) — never a second durable writer.
store_001_alignment.bridge_and_projection: envctl — forward-only redb->embed->PostgreSQL bridge and PostgreSQL->filesystem projection.
store_001_alignment.ingestion_path: nu_plugin CodeDB — Nushell AST -> redb buffer -> envctl bridge -> PostgreSQL.
store_001_alignment.closure_consistency: The postgres-foundation task families (LIFEOS-002, POSTGRES-001..010, PGAUTH-001..006, ADOPT-001/002, STORE-001, FOUNDATION-001..003) anchor to NS-EXTENSION/NS-WHOLE/NS-PROGRESS because the single canonical durable substrate is what makes David's intent a living, coherent, advancing whole. No durable class is silently reclassified; redb->PostgreSQL cutover is the verified BlobStore SHA-256 parity swap.

checks.name: coverage_complete
checks.detail: every North Star anchor must be coverage- and decomposition-complete

checks.name: dependencies_resolve
checks.detail: every parent_id must reference a task in the graph

checks.name: no_dependency_cycles
checks.detail: the dependency graph must be acyclic

checks.name: phases_decomposed
checks.detail: no declared phase may be empty and no task may sit in an undeclared phase

checks.name: tasks_anchored
checks.detail: every task must be anchored to a North Star outcome

checks.name: owner_opened_execution
checks.detail: the owner must explicitly open execution
